risks.description: Resend may reject customer-address delivery until a verified Northvalley sender domain is configured.
risks.mitigation: Staging test should use a known allowed recipient; verify sender domain before public launch.

risks.description: Cloudflare Pages preview runtime may not expose all production secrets.
risks.mitigation: Smoke-test Turnstile config and assessment teaser endpoint on PR preview.

risks.description: The sibling assessment service must be available for teaser generation.
risks.mitigation: Staging smoke test should verify the queue path reaches assessment.northvalleyintel.com.
